name: agentic_web_search
description: Search the web using a self-hosted SearXNG instance. Returns ranked results with title, URL, and snippet. Requires SearXNG running locally (docker compose up -d).

query.description: The search query. Example: 'open source MCP tools for AI agents'

categories.description: SearXNG category to search in: general, news, images, science, it, map, music, social_media, videos. Default: 'general'

language.description: Language code for results. Example: 'en', 'de', 'fr'. Default: 'en'

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return. Min 1, max 50. Default: 10
